title: Wescraft: Desire Paths
description: This mod adds erosion to grass upon stepping on it, creating desire paths.
body:
**Wescraft: Desire Paths** is a mod from the Wescraft Project that add more realism to Minecraft by eroding the grass as you travel. Retracing your steps may create desire paths.

### What are desire paths?

**Desire paths** are paths that are made artifically and unintentionally by **stepping on foliage**. Walking on grass blocks periodically erodes the top grass layer into coarse dirt. The **interval in which the grass is eroded**, as well as the **erosion chances** are configurable.

### Manage your lawn!

Sometimes, grass can be essential for decorational purposes, you may not want to trample the ground. **Wescraft: Desire Paths** adds a new enchantment called **Soft Step**, disabling erosion when wearing the enchantment on boots.

### Plans to expand the mod:
  - Add more steps of erosion
  - Make more block "erodable"
  - Modify the new block textures

Visit the **discord server** to report bugs or suggestions!
